experience.summary: Architected and delivered 5 production platforms from scratch, handling frontend, backend, database design, and deployment independently. Reduced dispatch time by 60% and built a cross-marketplace search engine with AI-powered semantic search.
experience.description: Full Stack Developer with team lead responsibilities at Mangwale, a multi-module marketplace platform for food, grocery, parcel, and vehicle rental. Independently shipped 5 live platforms owning frontend (React.js, Next.js, Flutter, React Native), backend (Python, Node.js, NestJS), databases (PostgreSQL, MySQL, OpenSearch, Redis), and cloud deployment (AWS EC2, NGINX, Docker). Built real-time systems with Socket.io and Firebase FCM, payment integration with Razorpay, and logistics APIs with Porter and Loadshare.

projects.name: Search API v2.0
projects.description: Cross-marketplace search engine combining full-text, semantic vector search (OpenSearch KNN/HNSW), and geospatial filtering with Python-based embedding services. 20+ search endpoints, two-tier caching, and ClickHouse analytics.

projects.name: Dispatcher Portal
projects.description: Full-stack logistics dispatch platform managing real-time order lifecycle with live rider tracking on Leaflet maps, multi-stop dispatch, OTP validation, and automated 3PL routing (Porter, Loadshare).

projects.name: Enterprise Dashboard
projects.description: B2B enterprise self-service dashboard enabling clients to place orders via API, manage prepaid wallets, download PDF invoices, and generate API keys with rate limiting.

projects.name: Rider Partner App
projects.description: Full-stack rider platform for onboarding, real-time order management, GPS tracking, earnings wallet, and withdrawals. React Native mobile app + React WebView hybrid + PWA.

projects.name: Helper Portal
projects.description: Helper portal for order management, Exotel voice calls, QR code generation with Node Canvas, and push notifications with dynamic SMS gateway selection.

projects.name: Mangwale Marketplace
projects.description: Multi-module Next.js marketplace with Firebase social auth, Redux Persist, i18next multi-language, and Google Maps address management for food, grocery, parcel, and rental.

points: Architected and delivered 5 production platforms from scratch, handling frontend, backend, database design, and deployment independently
Reduced dispatch time by 60% by building an automated order processing pipeline with cron-based scheduling, webhook-driven routing, and real-time rider tracking via Socket.io and Firebase FCM
Built a cross-module search API using NestJS, OpenSearch, and Python-based embedding services, powering full-text, semantic (vector/KNN), and geospatial search across all marketplace modules

Engineered a dual-database architecture (PostgreSQL + MySQL read mirror) serving 4 NestJS microservices with session-based and JWT authentication, Swagger-documented REST APIs, and 50+ TypeORM migrations
Built enterprise B2B logistics API platform with API key management, rate limiting, prepaid wallet system (Razorpay + UPI QR), and automated PDF invoice generation using Puppeteer

Maintained Flutter mobile apps for customer (MangwaleUser v3.3/v3.4) and vendor (VendorApp v3.5) platforms
Implemented QR code template engine using Node Canvas and Sharp, Exotel voice calling integration, and dynamic SMS gateway selection at runtime
Deployed containerized services using Docker Compose behind NGINX reverse proxies with TLS termination on AWS EC2
